criteria.maintainability: Code should have clear variable names, modular functions, and lack of deep nesting.
criteria.framework_skill: Proper use of standard library features, asynchronous programming, and RESTful principles.
criteria.error_handling: Explicit try/except blocks, logging, and avoiding silent failures.
criteria.algorithmic_efficiency: Avoids O(n^2) operations in data processing, uses appropriate data structures like sets/dicts.
